errors.cannotDeleteSelf: You cannot delete your own account

errors.OPENING_REASON_REQUIRED: A reason for opening is required
errors.TIME_BACKWARD_ONLY: The time can only be moved backwards

errors.TIME_FORWARD_ONLY: The time can only be moved forwards
errors.TIME_IN_FUTURE: The time must not be in the future
errors.WEAR_DEVICE_KG: Chastity devices use lock/open, not wear start/end
errors.WEAR_PHOTO_REQUIRED: A photo is required for this category

errors.USER_NO_EMAIL: The user has no e-mail address
errors.INSPECTION_ALREADY_WITHDRAWN: The inspection has already been withdrawn
errors.INSPECTION_NO_SUBMISSION: There is no submission for this inspection
errors.INSPECTION_ALREADY_ACTIVE: An inspection is already active – complete or withdraw it first
errors.INSPECTION_NOT_WITHDRAWN: Only withdrawn inspections can be deleted
errors.GOAL_USER_AND_START_REQUIRED: User and start date are required
errors.GOAL_PERIOD_TARGET_REQUIRED: At least one time target is required
errors.CATEGORY_DISALLOWS_GOALS: This category does not allow training goals
errors.GOAL_MONTH_TARGET_TOO_HIGH: A month has at most 744 hours
errors.GOAL_YEAR_TARGET_TOO_HIGH: A year has at most 8784 hours
errors.GOAL_WEEK_UNREACHABLE_VS_DAY: The weekly target is unreachable even at perfect daily fulfillment (more than 7x the daily target)
errors.GOAL_MONTH_UNREACHABLE_VS_DAY: The monthly target is unreachable even at perfect daily fulfillment (more than 31x the daily target)
errors.GOAL_YEAR_UNREACHABLE_VS_DAY: The yearly target is unreachable even at perfect daily fulfillment (more than 366x the daily target)
errors.LOCK_DEADLINE_REQUIRED: A deadline to lock up is required
errors.LOCK_PERIOD_ONLY_HAS_END: Only lock periods have an end
errors.LOCK_PERIOD_ALREADY_WITHDRAWN: The lock period has already been lifted
errors.LOCK_PERIOD_END_MUST_BE_FUTURE: The new end must be in the future
errors.LOCK_PERIOD_END_MUST_BE_AFTER_TRIGGER: The end must be after the scheduled lock period triggers
errors.ORGASM_WINDOW_REQUIRED: Start and end of the window are required
errors.ORGASM_END_BEFORE_START: The end must be after the start
errors.ORGASM_END_MUST_BE_FUTURE: The window's end must be in the future
errors.ORGASM_NOT_OPEN: The directive is no longer open
errors.JUDGMENT_NOT_FOUND: No judgment found for this offense
errors.PENALTY_NOT_PUNISHED: Only an imposed penalty can be completed
errors.OFFENSE_NOT_FOUND: No open offense with this reference
errors.REFERENCE_COPY_FAILED: The photo could not be copied
errors.REFERENCE_SOURCE_REQUIRED: An entry or a valid image URL is required
errors.DEVICE_CURRENCY_REQUIRED: Currency is required when a price is given
errors.BOX_RELOCK_NOT_LOCKED: No active lock session — the box follows the lock entry instead
errors.BOX_RELOCK_KEY_NOT_IN_BOX: According to your declaration the key is not in the box
errors.PLUG_ALREADY_WORN: The plug is already being worn
errors.PLUG_NOT_WORN: The plug is not being worn
errors.REGION_CONFLICT: Another device is already active in this body region. Remove it first, then start this one.
errors.SESSION_DEVICE_REQUIRED: A device is required for sessions
errors.SESSION_WRONG_CATEGORY: This device is not in a session category
errors.SESSION_ALREADY_ACTIVE: A session is already active in this category
errors.SESSION_NOT_ACTIVE: No active session in this category
errors.SESSION_VIDEO_REQUIRED: A video is mandatory when ending a session in this category
errors.PAUSE_DEVICE_REQUIRED: A device (cage/plug) is required for a pause
errors.PAUSE_PHOTO_REQUIRED: A photo is mandatory when ending a pause

errors.PAUSE_NOT_ACTIVE: No active pause for this device

errors.PAUSE_LIMIT_REACHED: Daily limit for this pause reached
errors.PLUG_REINIGUNG_FENSTER: Plug cleaning outside the permitted time window
errors.REWARD_GOAL_NOT_ELIGIBLE: Goal is no longer rewardable or already credited
errors.REWARD_WINDOW_ACTIVE: A reward window is already running

login.subtitle: Sign in to continue
login.accountLocked: Too many failed attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes.

dashboard.title: KG Tracker
dashboard.promoBody: Add categories like Plug, Collar or Cuffs — separate wear time, stats, and training goals.
dashboard.cleaningNoteForbidden: No cleaning openings during this lock period
dashboard.codeSealed: Code sealed — released when opening is permitted
dashboard.welcomeDesc: Create your first entry to start tracking.
dashboard.healthHoldActiveHint: The AI keyholder will not issue new demands or penalties while the hold is active. Existing locks remain in place.
dashboard.healthHoldTriggerHint: Signals your keyholder that you are not doing well right now. The AI will stop issuing new demands. You can end the hold yourself at any time.

newEntry.title: New entry
newEntry.bildersafeSubtitle: Photograph the set code — it's sealed and only released when opening is permitted. Attached to the current lock.
newEntry.bildersafeShowActionDesc: Retrieve the code (when opening is allowed)
newEntry.bildersafeShowNotLocked: You are not locked — no sealed code.
newEntry.bildersafeShowNoCode: No code is sealed for the current lock.
newEntry.bildersafeShowSealedHint: Released when opening is permitted (lock period ended or cleaning window).
newEntry.bildersafeShowReadHint: Opening permitted — read the code and open the lockbox.

boxStatus.pendingCloseAtDevice: Box lock requested — a button press closes the bolt
boxStatus.pendingOpenAtDevice: Open approved — pressing the button at the box opens the bolt
boxStatus.cleaningBlockedByLockPeriod: This lock period allows no cleaning
boxStatus.cleaningNoWindows: Cleaning not tied to specific times

lockForm.title: Log lock
lockForm.keyInBoxLabel: The key is in the box
lockForm.keyInBoxDesc: Off = you keep the key (e.g. while travelling). The box will not lock.
lockForm.codePhotoHint: Photograph the lockbox code – you don't need to see the digits (e.g. cover them with your thumb). The photo is sealed and only released when opening is permitted.
lockForm.codePhotoReadable: Code readable ✓ (digits are not shown to you)
lockForm.codePhotoNoCheck: Sealed (no automatic readability check — AI off)
lockForm.selectDeviceHint: Would you like to specify a model?
lockForm.noDeviceWarning: No device selected — the entry will be saved without a device.
lockForm.wrongDeviceWarning: Choosing a different CB will result in a log entry.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.messagePlaceholder: What would you like to share?
feedback.includeContactLabel: I'd like to receive a reply
feedback.emailRequired: Please provide your email or disable the reply option
feedback.privacyNote: Your feedback is sent to the maintainers. Only the message, page name, app version, and platform are transmitted — no username, no IP.
feedback.thankYouSubtitle: Your feedback helps improve the tracker.

openForm.title: Log opening
openForm.modalTitle: You are not permitted to open the device yet!!!
openForm.modalSubtext: Be aware that this will have consequences!
openForm.modalBoxStaysLocked: The box will NOT open. The entry records the opening — you can only release the bolt with the emergency key or by destroying the box.
openForm.modalTitleReinigung: You are not permitted to remove the device right now.
openForm.reinigungHintNoConfig: The current session will be interrupted. A new session starts with the next lock.
openForm.reinigungHintLockPeriod: This lock period allows no cleaning opening. The current session will be interrupted.
openForm.reinigungHintOutsideWindow: Outside the cleaning window. The current session will be interrupted.
openForm.reinigungLimitSubtext: You have already used {count} of your {max} allowed cleaning openings today. Another opening will be noted in the punishment log.
openForm.boxWontOpenTitle: The box will not open right now.
openForm.boxStaysShutBreak: This opening breaks the lock period. It is recorded and noted in the penalty log — the bolt stays shut.
openForm.boxStillCountsCleaning: The entry is recorded anyway, uses up one cleaning opening and interrupts the running session.
openForm.boxStillCounts: The entry is recorded anyway and interrupts the running session.
openForm.boxHoldsIndefinitely: The box holds indefinitely — until the keyholder lifts the lock period.
openForm.modalTitleToilette: You are not allowed to remove the device right now.
openForm.toiletteHint: You have {minutes} minutes for a toilet break.
openForm.toiletteHintNoConfig: The current session will be interrupted. A new session starts with the next lock.
openForm.erektionHint: An erection during opening will automatically be logged in the punishment record.

inspectionForm.title: Log inspection
inspectionForm.controlCodeHint: must be visible in the photo
inspectionForm.codeMismatchHint: Please show the code clearly in the photo – can still be saved.
inspectionForm.sealMismatchHint: Please show the seal number clearly in the photo – can still be saved.
inspectionForm.policyErrorHint: The image does not comply with content guidelines – can still be saved.
inspectionForm.photoRequired: A photo is required for an inspection
inspectionForm.sealAlsoRequired: The seal number of your lock must also be readable in the photo.
inspectionForm.verifyErrorHint: The photo is automatically re-checked when saving.

orgasmForm.title: Log orgasm
orgasmForm.photoMissing: This request requires a photo as proof.

settings.title: Settings
settings.timezoneHint: Display, input defaults, and the cleaning and sleep windows all follow this time zone.
settings.startPageHint: Where you land after logging in. Automatic = keyholders go to the overview (straight into the sub if there's exactly one), everyone else to their own tracker.
settings.startPageHintNoTracker: Where you land after logging in. Automatic = straight into the sub if you control exactly one, otherwise the keyholder overview.
settings.hideOwnTrackerHint: For keyholders without their own chastity tracker: hides your own card in the overview, the My view navigation and the green tracker area. No data is deleted — turn it back off and everything returns.
settings.emailNotAvailable: Email changes are currently not available.
settings.pushDenied: Notifications blocked – please enable them in browser settings.
settings.pushRegisterFailed: Push registration failed – please try again.
settings.pushNotSupported: Notifications are not supported in this browser.
settings.pushIosNotInstalled: Install the app to your home screen first to enable push notifications.
settings.pushIosOld: Push notifications require iOS 16.4 or later. Please update your device.
settings.statsEmpty: Statistics will appear after your first lock-up entry.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.upstreamBannerTitle: {count, plural, =1 {1 newer version available} other {# newer versions available}}
changelog.upstreamBannerHint: The following changes have not been installed yet. Self-hosters: docker compose pull && docker compose up -d

stats.title: Statistics
stats.showMore: {count, plural, one {Show 1 more month} other {Show # more months}}
stats.histEmptyHint: Once you reach training goals or rewards and penalties occur, they show up here.

admin.title: User management
admin.overviewDesc: Live status of all subs you control — with quick actions for inspections and locks.
admin.userManagementDesc: Create users, set their role and keyholders, or delete them.
admin.sectionAccountDesc: Username, email and password of this sub. You can change their email and password here.
admin.roleDesc: Sets whether this user is a normal sub or an administrator. Admins manage the instance and automatically control every sub.
admin.sectionReinigungDesc: Lets the sub briefly open the device for cleaning without it counting as a regular opening. Here you decide whether, how often and how long it's allowed.
admin.sectionReasonsDesc: Customize the selectable reasons the sub can pick when logging an orgasm or an opening.
admin.sectionAutoKontrolleDesc: Lets the system send inspection requests to the sub on its own, without you triggering them manually.
admin.sectionAppDesc: App behaviour for this sub — e.g. whether photo upload on mobile shows the file picker instead of the camera.
admin.notifyDesc: Which events of this sub are reported to you by email and/or push.
admin.sectionVorgabenDesc: Targets for wear time (per day/week/month/year) over a period. The sub sees their progress against these targets.
admin.sectionDangerDesc: Irreversible actions. Deleting removes the sub's account and all associated data permanently.
admin.requestOrgasmHint: Instruction or opportunity for an orgasm
admin.orgasmReqArtHint: If set, only this type counts as fulfilled.
admin.orgasmReqOpenAllowedHint: The sub may open the device to orgasm within the window without violating an active lock period.
admin.orgasmReqEndAfterStart: The end must be after the start.
admin.minDurationHint: A lock duration is automatically created after locking up.
admin.sperrUntilHint: Absolute lock end (wall clock) — stays fixed; locking up late does not shift it.
admin.reinigungErlaubtHint: Cleaning openings don't break the lock and aren't flagged as unauthorised openings (provided the user is generally allowed to clean).
admin.strafbuchNoEntries: No entries in the punishment log.
admin.cannotDeleteSelf: You cannot delete your own account.
admin.editLockDurationHint: Change or withdraw the active lock duration
admin.endetHintSperrzeit: Lock duration ends at the selected time
admin.futureDateRequired: Time must be in the future
admin.scheduleAtHint: Request is sent at this time; hidden from the sub until then.
admin.scheduleDelayHint: Request is sent after this delay; hidden from the sub until then.
admin.scheduleFutureRequired: Send time must be in the future
admin.keyholdersDesc: Users allowed to control this sub (keyholders). They can see the sub and later issue directives — but never control themselves.
admin.keyholdersNoCandidates: No assignable users — only non-admins can be keyholders (admins already control every sub). Create a user with the User role for this.
admin.autoKontrolleDesc: Automatically send a random number of inspections per day, randomly spread across the day.
admin.autoKontrolleFensterDesc: Only trigger inspections within this window. Off: spread evenly across the waking day.
admin.autoKontrolleNurBeiSperreDesc: Only trigger inspections while an active lock period is running. One that comes due without an active lock period is discarded (no catch-up).
admin.reasonOrgasmNote: For a sub-type write “Main – Sub” (e.g. “Orgasmus – Masturbation”). The sub then sees two dependent dropdowns.
admin.reasonReinigungNote: “Cleaning” is fixed and cannot be removed (only renamed).
admin.keyholderInstructionsDesc: Free-text rules for the AI keyholder acting over the MCP. The AI reads them and generally follows them (soft guidance, not enforced). You can always log in and intervene.
admin.keyholderInstructionsPlaceholder: e.g. Be strict with me. If I don't reach half of the weekly wear time on my own, demand it. Max lock period 24h. At most one lock request per 24h. Threaten penalties if I don't cooperate.
admin.mobileUploadAdminDesc: Show file picker instead of direct camera on mobile
admin.notifyMailDesc: Admin receives email notifications for this user's actions
admin.notifyPushDesc: Requires push notifications enabled in admin settings
admin.demoDesc: Creates «DemoUser» with 20 sessions, training goals & orgasms. Password:
admin.noUsersDesc: Create the first user to start managing.
admin.sectionLanguageDesc: This sub's language for the app, e-mails and push notifications (e.g. inspection reminders). You can set it here — the sub can also change it in their own settings.
admin.sectionInspectionEscalationDesc: Sends a reminder for overdue inspections and can automatically mark the device as removed if it keeps going unanswered.
admin.inspectionReminderDesc: Sends an additional reminder once the inspection deadline has passed.
admin.inspectionAutoMarkDesc: If the sub also ignores the reminder, the system automatically creates an opening entry.
admin.requestSessionHint: Request a training session via push / email
admin.sessionAnforderungIstStrafe: Impose as penalty (stricter escalation if ignored)
admin.orgasmReqBelohnungHint: Deducts 1 from the earned credit and opens a reward window (needs credit ≥ 1). Opening is allowed.
admin.orgasmReqIstStrafeHint: Marks this directive as a penalty (e.g. mandatory ruined orgasm). If ignored, the stricter escalation applies (≥2× → severe).
admin.kontrolleInstructionPlugPlaceholder: Instructions (optional) – e.g. show photo with plug
admin.sectionCageDesc: Cleaning and toilet breaks for the chastity cage.
admin.strafbuchLegendeHint: Suggestions are guidance, not binding. Ordered ruined orgasm (mandatory) & mandatory session = penalty; a normal orgasm (opportunity) = reward.
admin.strafbuchAktionStundenFehlt: Please provide hours (> 0) for the lock extension.
admin.strafbuchStrafeOderAktion: Please enter a penalty or choose an action.
admin.belohnungNone: No reached, open goals right now.
admin.toilettePausenDesc: Brief opening without a log entry
admin.sectionToiletteDesc: Allows the sub to briefly remove the device for a toilet break without it counting as a regular opening.
admin.toiletteErlaubtHint: Toilet openings don't break the lock and aren't flagged as unauthorised openings (provided the user is generally allowed to use the toilet).
admin.kontrolleNeedsCode: No code entered on the lock entry
admin.plugSperrzeitNachrichtPlaceholder: Optional note about the wear duration …
admin.plugSperrzeitEndetHint: Plug must be worn until this time
admin.aikhPageDesc: Configure the autonomous AI Keyholder for this user.
admin.aikhEnabledDesc: The AI Keyholder can send messages and assign tasks to the user.
admin.aikhAnthropicApiKeyPlaceholder: sk-ant-... (leave empty to use environment variable)
admin.aikhAnthropicApiKeyHint: Stored encrypted. Leave empty to use ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from the .env file.
admin.aikhAnthropicApiKeySet: API key is stored — leave the field empty to keep it.
admin.aikhSystemPromptHint: Defines the AI's personality and rules. Passed as context on every chat turn.
admin.healthHoldAdminHint: The sub has signalled they need a break. The AI keyholder will not issue new demands or penalties until the hold is ended.
admin.aikhIntensityHint: Controls how often and how harshly the AI acts (tone, penalty severity, frequency) — never the safety rules or anatomical limits.
admin.aikhResetConfirm: Permanently delete conversation history and AI notes?
admin.personaNameExists: A persona with this name already exists.
admin.aikhCronHint: e.g. «0 */6 * * *» = every 6 hours. Leave blank to disable autonomous runs.
admin.aikhRandomIntervalHint: The AI acts at random intervals between the minimum and maximum minutes.
admin.aikhRunNowDesc: Triggers an immediate autonomous run (only when enabled).
admin.aikhRunNoAction: AI decided to take no action.
admin.aikhMediaEnabledDesc: The AI can generate images and videos via ComfyUI and present them as tasks.
admin.aikhStatusCronNone: No cron schedule configured — autonomous mode inactive.
admin.sectionPlugDesc: Settings for the anal plug: cleaning and toilet breaks while wearing.
admin.plugToiletteDesc: Allows brief removal for a toilet break
admin.plugToiletteAlwaysDesc: Always allowed – brief removal for a toilet break (unlimited)
admin.strafbuchAblehnenPlaceholder: Why is the completion not sufficient? (shown to the sub)
admin.orgasmReqFotoPflichtHint: Unchecked, the sub may attach a photo voluntarily; checked, it is mandatory when logging.
admin.aikhVisionHint: The keyholder receives up to 3 current photos (pending penalty proofs first, then the newest entries of the last 72 h) as images and can judge them. Requires a vision-capable model — turn off for a text-only (local) model.
admin.strafbuchAutoEntferntDetail: Inspection not answered — the system automatically recorded the lock as removed.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password

forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account with this username exists and an email address is on file, an email has been sent.

sessionGuard.switched: You were redirected to a different account — reloading.

categories.title: Categories
categories.name: Name
categories.trackingEnabledHint: When on, devices in this category can be tracked in sessions. Otherwise inventory only.
categories.requirePhotoHint: When on, WEAR_BEGIN entries need a photo (similar to KG lock).
categories.allowVorgabenHint: When on, admin can set training goals (day/week/month) for this category.
categories.featuresKg: Photo required · Seal detection · Inspections · Cleaning pauses
categories.emptyDescription: Add categories like Plug, Collar or Cuffs to track them separately.
categories.usageStats: {devices, plural, =0 {No devices} =1 {1 device} other {# devices}} · {vorgaben, plural, =0 {no goals} =1 {1 goal} other {# goals}}
categories.isSessionCategoryHint: Enables training sessions instead of wear tracking. Suitable for toys without a lock (e.g. dildo, vibrator).
categories.regionHint: Two devices in the same region cannot be active at the same time (e.g. anal plug + anal dildo). "None" = no restriction.
categories.maxSessionMinutesHint: Recommended maximum duration per session (1–120 min.).
categories.requiresVideoHint: User must upload a video when ending a session.
categories.orgasmusZielHint: Sets whether an orgasm is expected or forbidden at session end.

devices.title: My devices
devices.emptyDescription: Add your first device (chastity belt, plug, collar, …) to start tracking wear time.
devices.name: Name
devices.referencesHint: Example photos per device improve automatic device detection. Upload good shots or import them from your lock photos.
devices.deleteConfirm: Really delete this device? This cannot be undone.
devices.archiveConfirm: This device will be archived because it has been used in sessions. It will no longer appear in the selection.
devices.sortOrderHint: Order within the category (smaller = smaller). Used for the penalty action next larger device.

strafen.title: My penalties
strafen.intro: Penalties imposed on you: report them as done once you have completed them. Your keyholder reviews the report.

strafen.proofHint: A photo is voluntary — but it makes the review easier.
